{{- /* TODO: maybe we need to remove style from $opts */ -}} {{- $opts := merge dict .Options -}} {{- $engine := "chroma" }} {{- if not (and .Type (transform.CanHighlight .Type)) -}}{{- $engine = "hljs" }}{{- end }} {{- with .Options.style }} {{ $opts = merge $opts (dict "wrapperClass" (printf "highlight %s-%s" $engine .)) }} {{- else }} {{ $opts = merge $opts (dict "wrapperClass" (printf "highlight %s-%s" $engine (or site.Params.huggingface.markup.chromaStyle "monokai"))) }} {{- end }} {{- if eq $engine "chroma" -}} {{- (transform.HighlightCodeBlock . $opts).Wrapped -}} {{- else }} {{- .Page.Store.Set "loadHighlightJS" true -}} {{- $type := .Type | replaceRE `^hljs-?` ""}} {{ $lang := ""}} 

      {{- (transform.HighlightCodeBlock . $opts).Inner -}}
{{- end -}}
